@@ -79,5 +79,5 @@
 - Changes: added a local `dated_file` closure inside `message_paths` and reused it for canonical, outbox, and inbox paths so each base appends the same `YYYY/MM/<filename>.md` suffix in one place.
 - Preservation notes: canonical/outbox/inbox base directories are unchanged; sender validation still happens before archive root lookup; recipient validation still happens inside the recipient loop; message rendering, BCC redaction, rel-path collection, Git enqueue, and write ordering were untouched.
 - Verification: worker fresh-eyes inspection passed and corrected the artifact scoring; `cargo fmt --check`; `git diff --check`; `cargo test -p mcp-agent-mail-storage test_write_message_bundle --locked`; `cargo check -p mcp-agent-mail-storage --all-targets`; `cargo clippy -p mcp-agent-mail-storage --all-targets -- -D warnings`; `ubs crates/mcp-agent-mail-storage/src/lib.rs` completed with existing file-wide panic/test-warning inventory, while fmt/clippy/check/test subchecks were clean and none of the critical findings touched the changed `message_paths` lines.
